title: Subtype Field
text: Subtype Field A Subtype Field references a Supertype Field and initially inherits its properties and code containers. Characteristics Characteristics Icon: Object type code: fld Main Development Object? No Part of: Supertype Entity Contains: Value, Property , Code Container Generalization: Modeled Field Specializations: — Compilation Output — URI format: ent: SupertypeEntityName /ent: SubtypeEntityName /fld: FieldName Specialization A derived field specializes Modeled Field in the following ways: It has a Subtype Entity as parent. If it is not derived from a Supertype Field, it must be a Non-Database Field. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
